Efficient Therapist
Sponsored
Still contemplating joining our transformative programs? We believe in your potential and vision! Use code 'ET10' for an extra 10% off!

Are you ready to take your love of aromatherapy to the next level? Would you like to become a certified expert in the art and science of essential oils? If so, our aromatherapy certification course is perfect for you!

Our comprehensive course will teach you everything you need to know to become a certified aromatherapist. From the basics of essential oils to advanced techniques for creating individual blends and treating common ailments, you will gain the knowledge and skills needed to help others improve their health and well-being.

Contents of the certification program:
✅ Module 1: Introduction, prerequisites, and precautions
✅ Module 2: History, religion, and botany
✅ Module 3: Perfumes and sense of smell
✅ Module 4: Distillation, extraction, and skin absorption
✅ Module 5: Alchemy, astrology, and symbols
✅ Module 6: Practical aromatherapy
✅ Module 7: Scientific aromatherapy and holistic method
✅ Module 8: The intelligence and language of plants
✅ Module 9: Origin, terroir, and synergies
✅ Module 10: Alternative medicine and the human body

This training has been professionally designed and certified by IPHM (International Practitioners of Holistic Medicine), CMA (Complementary Medical Association), and CPD (Centre of CPD Excellence). Three internationally accredited institutions of practitioners of holistic medicine.
EFFICIENTHERAPIST.COM
Unlock 10% Savings!
Use the code 'ET10'
Shop now
